mapper.sql: id, sale_code, build_config_code, enable, sort, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO vso_sale_model_build_config ( sale_code, build_config_code, enable, sort, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.saleCode}, #{item.buildConfigCode}, #{item.enable}, #{item.sort}, #{item.description}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_sale_model_build_config t SET
t.sale_code = #{saleCode},
t.build_config_code = #{buildConfigCode},
t.enable = #{enable},
t.sort = #{sort},
t.description = #{description},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{id}
UPDATE vso_sale_model_build_config t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vso_sale_model_build_config t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1
